mapper.select: select s.id, s.category_id, s.title, case when s.thumb like 'http%' then concat('/static/img/sites/site-', lpad(s.id, 4, '0'), case when s.thumb like '%.ico%' then '.ico' else '.png' end) else s.thumb end thumb, s.description, s.url, s.create_time, s.update_time, c.title categoryTitle from site s left join category c on s.category_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.category_id, s.title, case when s.thumb like 'http%' then concat('/static/img/sites/site-', lpad(s.id, 4, '0'), case when s.thumb like '%.ico%' then '.ico' else '.png' end) else s.thumb end thumb, s.description, s.url, s.create_time, s.update_time, c.title categoryTitle from site s left join category c on s.category_id = c.id where 1=1
and ( s.title like CONCAT('%',#{title},'%') or s.description like CONCAT('%',#{title},'%') )
and (s.category_id = #{categoryId} or s.category_id in ( select id from category where parent_id = #{categoryId} ))
order by s.id LIMIT #{offset},#{size}

select count(1) from site where 1=1
and ( title like CONCAT('%',#{title},'%') or description like CONCAT('%',#{title},'%') )
and (category_id = #{categoryId} or category_id in ( select id from category where parent_id = #{categoryId} ))
mapper.insert:
insert into site
category_id=#{categoryId}, title=#{title}, thumb=#{thumb}, description=#{description}, url=#{url}, create_time=now()
